chunks.memory_unit_text: In the strapi/strapi release v5.31.3, bug fixes include enter key trigger in edit view form, CLI transfer command ignoring flags, AI chat message width and submit behavior, contributor docs website build, and GraphQL scope status filter inheritance. Chores update DS version, Vietnamese translations, replace deprecated Buffer.slice(), and isolate AI APIs to EE folder.

## 5.32.0 (2025-12-10)
### 🚀 New feature
- **core:** adding clear button to boolean toggle ([#24836](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24836))
- **users-permissions:** add refresh and logout actions to default permissions ([#24877](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24877))

- don't translate enums with ai ([#24965](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24965))
- change several file field types from string to text ([#24931](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24931))
- added media to list of non localized fields ([#24967](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24967))
- **content-manager:** blocks editor state always contains at least a paragraph block ([#24990](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24990))
- **content-type-builder:** disable display of invisible content types ([#24970](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24970))
- **core/upload:** rollback file name to string ([#25004](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/25004))
- **graphql:** graphql performance regression ([#25017](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/25017))
### 📚 Documentation Changes
- readme files explain shared code ([dfcffa7413](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/commit/dfcffa7413))
### ⚙️ Chore
- fix paths ([099999c1d0](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/commit/099999c1d0))
- merge test runners ([bb00d5e691](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/commit/bb00d5e691))
- adding claude Reviewer ([88b966db48](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/commit/88b966db48))
- bump testing library dependencies ([16b0f3c011](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/commit/16b0f3c011))
- update pinned axios, glob, form-data, and sha.js ([#25005](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/25005))
- **admin:** guided tour should only display in development ([#24907](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/24907))
### ❤️ Thank You
- Adrien L
- Araksya Gevorgyan @araksyagevorgyan
- Bassel Kanso
- Ben Irvin
- DMehaffy
- HichamELBSI
- Jamie Howard @jhoward1994
- markkaylor
- Nico André
- Rémi de Juvigny @remidej
- Simon Norris
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the strapi/strapi release v5.32.0, new features add a clear button to boolean toggle and refresh/logout actions to default permissions. Bug fixes address Playwright storage state, AI enum translation, file field types, media localization, blocks editor state, invisible content types, upload file name rollback, and GraphQL performance regression. Documentation changes explain shared code in readme files. Chores fix paths, merge test runners, add Claude reviewer, bump testing library dependencies, update pinned dependencies, and restrict guided tour to development.

## 5.33.0 (2025-12-17)
### 🚀 New feature
- update iso-locales.json with pap & regional variants ([#25000](https://github.com/strapi/strapi/pull/25000))

- Bassel Kanso @Bassel17
- Deepak gupta @guptadeepak8
- Jerry @flammangj
- kajgiesbersflavour @kajgiesbersflavour
- Maksim Zhukau @MaksZhukov
- mathildeleg @mathildeleg
- Mohamed osama @mooka95
- Nico André
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the strapi/strapi release v5.33.0, new features update iso-locales.json with pap and regional variants, allow content-type ID schema as number or string, add Russian translations for admin components, and add Luxembourgish locale. Bug fixes add scrollbar in media modal, handle long text in layout header, clear edit views configuration, handle undefined guidedTourMeta, precompute built-in GraphQL query fields, and disable gpgsign for e2e commits. Chores add worktrees support and reference contributor docs link.
